explicit_text: I served in World War II as part of the U.S. Air Force, reaching the rank of major before I decided to go home. During the war, I flew numerous missions with the 91st Bomb Group in Europe, including dangerous raids over Germany. My service included being wounded in action and recovering before completing my operational tour in 1943. The war shaped much of my adult life and career.

explicit_text: While serving as a navigation instructor, I was sent to Louisiana with a classmate to evaluate a navigation school and demonstrate techniques to returning airmen. During one session, I made the mistake of showing how to make a dry martini, which got me in trouble with the colonel. That incident nearly led to a court-martial but ended with a warning and a promise to avoid Texas.
